'''Green Forge''' was a group of environmental terrorists who were active in the years preceding the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. The group was known for their tactics of destroying headquarters or refineries of companies that they felt had committed environmental crime.

A notable member of the group was [[Buck]], who would have affairs with wealthy women and use them to achieve his ends.
